name: Sample variance from a list
task: Create /tmp/eval_var2/var.py with sample_variance(data) using denominator n-1 (Bessel's correction). Raise ValueError if len(data) < 2.

validation.script:
import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_var2/var.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); V = mod.sample_variance; assert abs(V([2,4,4,4,5,5,7,9]) - 4.571428571428571) < 1e-9
try: V([1])
except ValueError: pass
else: raise AssertionError
print('OK')
